title: Task 1.10: Document Epic 1 functions in API_REFERENCE.md
description: Document all scenario lifecycle functions in docs/API_REFERENCE.md with examples

title: Task 1.5: Implement scenario_drop
description: Remove scenario, drop delta tables/schema, remove from registry. Fail if other scenarios branched from it. Source: scenario_manager.cpp. Test: scenario_lifecycle.test
close_reason: scenario_drop was implemented as part of Task 1.2. All tests passing.

title: Task 3.0: Implement scenario_compare (single table)
description: Compare table between two schemas. Output: diff_type, pk_columns, column_name, old_value, new_value. Source: comparison_engine.cpp/hpp. Test: scenario_comparison.test

title: Task 2.7: Implement constraint inheritance
description: Enforce CHECK, NOT NULL, PK uniqueness across logical view, FK against logical view. Violation rolls back statement. Source: delta_storage_engine.cpp. Test: scenario_constraints.test

title: Task 4.0: Create snapshot metadata table
description: Add _scenario_snapshots table. Source: metadata_store.cpp. Test: scenario_snapshots.test

title: Task 5.2: Implement protocol_log_change
description: Append to Changes section. No auto-interception, user/agent calls. Source: protocol_manager.cpp. Test: scenario_protocols.test

title: Task 2.9: Implement no-PK table handling
description: Tables without PK use all columns as composite key. Warn at scenario creation. Document duplicate row behavior. Source: delta_storage_engine.cpp. Test: scenario_no_pk.test

title: Task 1.2: Implement scenario_create (basic)
description: Create scenario with schema creation and registry entry. Validate name (alphanumeric + underscore, max 63 chars). Reject duplicates. Source: scenario_manager.cpp/hpp. Test: scenario_lifecycle.test
close_reason: Implemented scenario_create and scenario_drop as ScalarFunctions. All tests passing.

title: Task 2.2: Implement OptimizerExtension for write interception
description: Register pre_optimize_function to intercept LogicalInsert/Update/Delete on scenario schemas. Source: optimizer_extension.cpp/hpp. Test: scenario_write.test

title: Task 2.10: Implement wrapper procedures (fallback)
description: scenario_insert, scenario_update, scenario_delete explicit procedures. Source: scenario_procedures.cpp. Test: scenario_write_explicit.test

title: Task 6.2: Implement rowid validation (scenario_validate)
description: Detect stale state after VACUUM. Warn if reorganized. Source: delta_storage_engine.cpp. Test: scenario_validation.test

title: Task 5.3: Implement protocol_add_finding
description: Append to Findings section. Source: protocol_manager.cpp. Test: scenario_protocols.test

title: Task 6.3: Implement error message improvements
description: All errors include scenario name, indicate base vs delta, suggest remediation. Test: scenario_errors.test

title: Task 4.4: Implement scenario_from_snapshot
description: Create scenario using snapshot as base. Comparisons default to snapshot. Source: snapshot_manager.cpp. Test: scenario_snapshots.test

title: Task 2.0: Create delta table structure
description: Delta tables: _delta_<tablename> with _op (I/U/D), _ts, _version + all base columns. Source: delta_storage_engine.cpp/hpp. Test: scenario_write.test

title: Task 2.11: Document Epic 2 functions in API_REFERENCE.md
description: Document all COW operations in docs/API_REFERENCE.md with examples

title: Task 3.2: Implement scenario_compare_all
description: Summary: per-table added/removed/changed/unchanged rows. Efficient (no full materialization). Source: comparison_engine.cpp. Test: scenario_comparison.test

title: Task 1.4: Implement scenario_list
description: Table function returning scenario metadata. Returns: name, schema_name, base_schema, base_captured_at, created_at, status, description. Order by created_at DESC. Source: scenario_manager.cpp. Test: scenario_lifecycle.test
close_reason: Implemented scenario_list as TableFunction. All tests passing.

title: Task 4.1: Implement snapshot_create
description: Create point-in-time snapshot. Read-only, uses COW. Creates protocol entry. Source: snapshot_manager.cpp/hpp. Test: scenario_snapshots.test

title: Task 2.4: Implement transparent UPDATE
description: UPDATE creates _op='U' entries for base rows, modifies existing delta rows. WHERE on logical view. Source: delta_storage_engine.cpp. Test: scenario_write.test

title: Task 1.8: Implement scenario_branch
description: Create scenario from existing scenario. Copy delta tables, record parent_scenario_id. Changes in source don't affect branch. Source: scenario_manager.cpp. Test: scenario_branching.test

title: Task 1.0: Rename extension quack → anofox_scenario
description: Rename extension from quack to anofox_scenario. Rename src/quack_extension.cpp to src/anofox_scenario_extension.cpp. Update CMakeLists.txt and extension_config.cmake. Test file: anofox_scenario_load.test
close_reason: Extension renamed from quack to anofox_scenario. Build and tests pass.

title: Task 2.8: Implement DDL blocking
description: Block CREATE/ALTER/DROP TABLE in scenarios with clear error. TRUNCATE treated as DELETE. Source: optimizer_extension.cpp. Test: scenario_constraints.test

title: Task 2.1: Implement merge-on-read views
description: Create views combining base + delta with hash anti-join for O(N+D). Respect snapshot isolation. Source: delta_storage_engine.cpp. Test: scenario_read.test

title: Task 6.6: Final documentation review
description: Complete API_REFERENCE.md and docs/spec/architecture.md

title: Task 6.4: Verify database portability
description: Copy database preserves scenarios, protocols. No external deps. Test: scenario_portability.test

title: Task 5.5: Implement protocol_read
description: Table function: section_name, content, updated_at. Source: protocol_manager.cpp. Test: scenario_protocols.test

title: Task 5.7: Document Epic 5 functions in API_REFERENCE.md
description: Document all protocol functions in docs/API_REFERENCE.md

title: Task 3.3: Implement scenario-to-scenario comparison
description: Two-arg comparison uses current states of both scenarios. Source: comparison_engine.cpp. Test: scenario_comparison.test

title: Task 1.1: Create metadata tables
description: Create internal metadata tables: _scenario_registry, _scenario_tables, _scenario_base_rowids. Source: metadata_store.cpp/hpp. Test: scenario_metadata.test
close_reason: Metadata tables created: _scenario_registry, _scenario_tables, _scenario_base_rowids, _scenario_snapshots, _scenario_protocols. All tests pass.

title: Task 5.4: Implement protocol_set_plan/decision
description: Set Plan and Decision sections. Source: protocol_manager.cpp. Test: scenario_protocols.test

title: Task 4.2: Implement snapshot_list
description: Returns: snapshot_name, source_schema, created_at, description, size_bytes. Order by created_at DESC. Source: snapshot_manager.cpp. Test: scenario_snapshots.test

title: Task 4.6: Document Epic 4 functions in API_REFERENCE.md
description: Document all snapshot functions in docs/API_REFERENCE.md

title: Task 2.3: Implement transparent INSERT
description: INSERT INTO scenario.table redirects to delta with _op='I'. Support INSERT...SELECT and bulk. Source: delta_storage_engine.cpp. Test: scenario_write.test

title: Task 6.0: Performance validation spike
description: Validate merge-on-read overhead: <20% for 1% delta, <30% for 5% delta at 10M rows. Test: scenario_performance.test

title: Task 1.9: Implement scenario_schema_prefix config
description: SET scenario_schema_prefix = '_my_'. Default is '_scen_'. Session-scoped. scenario_list() shows both names. Source: extension config. Test: scenario_config.test

title: Task 3.4: Document Epic 3 functions in API_REFERENCE.md
description: Document all comparison functions in docs/API_REFERENCE.md

title: Task 1.7: Implement scenario_archive/unarchive
description: Archive sets status='archived', queryable but no writes. Unarchive restores active. Source: scenario_manager.cpp. Test: scenario_lifecycle.test

title: Task 4.3: Implement snapshot_compare
description: Compare current state against snapshot. Same output as scenario_compare. Source: snapshot_manager.cpp. Test: scenario_snapshots.test

title: Task 4.5: Implement snapshot_drop
description: Delete snapshot. Fail if scenarios depend on it. Archive protocol data. Source: snapshot_manager.cpp. Test: scenario_snapshots.test

title: Task 2.6: Implement SET SCHEMA activation
description: SET SCHEMA scenario_name makes scenario default. Unqualified tables resolve to scenario then main. Session-scoped. Source: extension. Test: scenario_read.test

title: Task 2.5: Implement transparent DELETE
description: DELETE creates _op='D' tombstones for base rows, removes inserted delta rows. Source: delta_storage_engine.cpp. Test: scenario_write.test

title: Task 6.1: Implement concurrent read safety
description: Multiple sessions read same scenario. Single-writer enforced. Source: scenario_manager.cpp. Test: scenario_concurrent.test

title: Task 5.6: Implement protocol_export_markdown
description: Export to markdown file via DuckDB filesystem. Source: protocol_manager.cpp. Test: scenario_protocols.test

title: Task 5.0: Create protocol storage table
description: _scenario_protocols and archive table. Source: metadata_store.cpp. Test: scenario_protocols.test

title: Task 1.6: Implement scenario_stats
description: Return modification statistics: per-table rows_inserted/updated/deleted, delta_size_bytes, totals, base_captured_at. Source: scenario_manager.cpp. Test: scenario_lifecycle.test

title: Task 1.3: Implement scenario_create (table registration)
description: Register base tables, capture rowids, create delta tables. Warn if no PK. Source: scenario_manager.cpp, delta_storage_engine.cpp. Test: scenario_lifecycle.test
close_reason: Implemented scenario_create with table registration and rowid capture. Removed FK constraint that was incompatible with scalar function execution model. All tests passing.

title: Task 3.1: Implement compare to branch origin
description: Single-arg scenario_compare compares to base_captured_at state. For branched, compares to parent at branch time. Source: comparison_engine.cpp. Test: scenario_comparison.test

title: Task 6.5: Integration test suite
description: End-to-end tests for UC-01 to UC-04 (what-if, supplier risk, baseline, branching). Test: scenario_integration.test

title: Task 5.1: Implement protocol_set_why
description: Set Why section. Overwrites, accepts multi-line markdown. Source: protocol_manager.cpp/hpp. Test: scenario_protocols.test
